sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 93

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 93:1
items.html:
(to the question) Tzela [rib]
When the Nukva is cleaved back-to-back to the back of the chest of ZA, she is called Tzela [rib], for she is cleaved to his Guf, and the two of them use one wall. (Item 57)
